content:
Linking Words to Show Cause and Effect

Cause and Effect ဆိုတာ "အကြောင်း" နဲ့ "အကျိုး" ကို ပြတာပါ။ Cause ဆိုတာ "ဘာကြောင့်ဖြစ်လဲ"၊ Effect ဆိုတာ "ဘာဖြစ်သွားလဲ" ဆိုတာပါ။ Linking words တွေက စကားစုနှစ်ခုကို ချိတ်ဆက်ပေးပါတယ်။

Structure/Formula: Cause + because/since/as + Effect  |  Effect + so/therefore/as a result + Cause

👉 Cause: He was sick. Effect: He stayed at home. → He stayed at home because he was sick.

👉 Cause: It rained heavily. Effect: The match was cancelled. → It rained heavily, so the match was cancelled.

👉 Cause: She studied hard. Effect: She passed the exam. → She studied hard; therefore, she passed the exam.

👉 Cause: There was heavy rain. Effect: The flight was delayed. → Due to heavy rain, the flight was delayed.

🔑 Key Points:

  • Cause (အကြောင်း) အတွက်: because, since, as, due to, owing to
  • Effect (အကျိုး) အတွက်: so, therefore, thus, as a result, consequently
  • because နဲ့ so ကို တစ်ကြောင်းတည်းမှာ အတူမသုံးရပါ
  • due to နောက်မှာ noun သာသုံးရ၊ verb မသုံးရပါ

⚠️ Common Mistakes:

  • ❌ "Because he was sick, so he stayed at home." (because နဲ့ so ကို အတူမသုံးရ)
  • ❌ "Due to he was sick, he stayed at home." (due to နောက် verb မသုံးရ)
  • ❌ "Since" နဲ့ "because" ကို တစ်ကြောင်းတည်းမှာ အတူမသုံးရ
